title: Bill Edwards (actor)

infobox.value: (1918-09-14)September 14, 1918  [Sea Isle City, New Jersey](/wiki/Sea_Isle_City,_New_Jersey "Sea Isle City, New Jersey"), United States

(September 14, 1918 – December 21, 1999) was an American film and television actor, championship [rodeo](/wiki/Rodeo "Rodeo") rider, and artist.[[1]](#cite_note-afi-1) His film roles include *[Hail the Conquering Hero](/wiki/Hail_the_Conquering_Hero "Hail the Conquering Hero")*, *[Our Hearts Were Young and Gay](/wiki/Our_Hearts_Were_Young_and_Gay_(film) "Our Hearts Were Young and Gay (film)")*, and *[The Virginian](/wiki/The_Virginian_(1946_film) "The Virginian (1946 film)")*. He is also known for his recurring role as Jonathan Kaye in the television series *[Hawaii Five-O](/wiki/Hawaii_Five-O_(1968_TV_series) "Hawaii Five-O (1968 TV series)")*.
["BILL EDWARDS"](https://catalog.afi.com/Person/21097-Bill-Edwards). [American Film Institute](/wiki/American_Film_Institute "American Film Institute"). Retrieved November 7, 2018.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

American actor (1918–1999)

| Bill Edwards | |
| --- | --- |
| Edwards in *[The Fighting Stallion](/wiki/The_Fighting_Stallion "The Fighting Stallion")* (1950) | |
| Born | (1918-09-14)September 14, 1918  [Sea Isle City, New Jersey](/wiki/Sea_Isle_City,_New_Jersey "Sea Isle City, New Jersey"), United States |
| Died | December 21, 1999(1999-12-21) (aged 81)  [Newport Beach, California](/wiki/Newport_Beach,_California "Newport Beach, California"), U.S. |
| Occupations | [Film](/wiki/Film "Film"), [television](/wiki/Television "Television") [actor](/wiki/Actor "Actor"), [Artist](/wiki/Artist "Artist") |
| Years active | 1938–1987 |
| Spouse | Hazel Allen |
| Children | Linda Edwards |

**Bill Edwards** (September 14, 1918 – December 21, 1999) was an American film and television actor, championship [rodeo](/wiki/Rodeo "Rodeo") rider, and artist.[[1]](#cite_note-afi-1) His film roles include *[Hail the Conquering Hero](/wiki/Hail_the_Conquering_Hero "Hail the Conquering Hero")*, *[Our Hearts Were Young and Gay](/wiki/Our_Hearts_Were_Young_and_Gay_(film) "Our Hearts Were Young and Gay (film)")*, and *[The Virginian](/wiki/The_Virginian_(1946_film) "The Virginian (1946 film)")*. He is also known for his recurring role as Jonathan Kaye in the television series *[Hawaii Five-O](/wiki/Hawaii_Five-O_(1968_TV_series) "Hawaii Five-O (1968 TV series)")*.

He appeared in the 1961 episode of *[Danger Man](/wiki/Danger_Man "Danger Man")* entitled "The Girl Who Liked GI's" as Sgt. Poole.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Selected filmography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bill_Edwards_(actor)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Selected filmography")]

* *[Adventure in Iraq](/wiki/Adventure_in_Iraq "Adventure in Iraq")* (1943) as Radio Operator
* *[You Can't Ration Love](/wiki/You_Can%27t_Ration_Love "You Can't Ration Love")* (1944) as Pete Allen, big man on campus
* *[Hail the Conquering Hero](/wiki/Hail_the_Conquering_Hero "Hail the Conquering Hero")* (1943) as Forrest Noble
* *[Our Hearts Were Young and Gay](/wiki/Our_Hearts_Were_Young_and_Gay_(film) "Our Hearts Were Young and Gay (film)")* (1944) as Tom Newhall
* *[Miss Susie Slagle's](/wiki/Miss_Susie_Slagle%27s "Miss Susie Slagle's")* (1946) as Elijah Howe, Jr.
* *[The Virginian](/wiki/The_Virginian_(1946_film) "The Virginian (1946 film)")* (1946) as Sam Bennett
* *[Our Hearts Were Growing Up](/wiki/Our_Hearts_Were_Growing_Up "Our Hearts Were Growing Up")* (1946) as Tom Newhall
* *[Danger Street](/wiki/Danger_Street_(1947_film) "Danger Street (1947 film)")* (1947) as Sandy Evans
* *[Home in San Antone](/wiki/Home_in_San_Antone "Home in San Antone")* (1949) as Ted Gibson
* *[Trail of the Yukon](/wiki/Trail_of_the_Yukon "Trail of the Yukon")* (1949) as Jim Blaine
* *[The Fighting Stallion](/wiki/The_Fighting_Stallion "The Fighting Stallion")* (1950) as Lon Evans
* *[Federal Man](/wiki/Federal_Man "Federal Man")* (1950) as Agent George Palmer
* *[Border Outlaws](/wiki/Border_Outlaws "Border Outlaws")* (1950) as Mike Hoskins
* *[The First Legion](/wiki/The_First_Legion "The First Legion")* (1951) as Joe
* *[Sea Hunt](/wiki/Sea_Hunt "Sea Hunt")* (1961, Season 4, Episode 19) as USCG Commander Murdock
* *[Tora! Tora! Tora!](/wiki/Tora!_Tora!_Tora! "Tora! Tora! Tora!")* (1970) as Colonel Kendall J. Fiedler
* *[Hawaii Five-O](/wiki/Hawaii_Five-O_(1968_TV_series) "Hawaii Five-O (1968 TV series)")* (1972-1978) as Jonathan Kaye
* *Inferno in Paradise* (1974) as Captain Martin
